nasb.text: He engraved on the plates of its stays and on its borders, cherubim, lions and palm trees, according to the clear space on each, with wreaths all around.

esv.text: And on the surfaces of its stays and on its panels, he carved cherubim, lions, and palm trees, according to the space of each, with wreaths all around.

cnv.text: 又在撐子和邊緣的上面刻有基路伯、獅子和棕樹，又在各空處，周圍刻上花紋。

ccb.text: 支架和镶板都刻上基路伯天使、狮子和棕树的图案，周围有花环图案。
